name: Zero to One
description: Full product launch. Vision to market.

phases.name: Vision
phases.task_template: Research and architect the initial blueprint for: ${goal}

phases.name: Build
phases.task_template: Build the MVP based on the vision blueprint for: ${goal}
phases.checkpoint: All tests passing and code reviewed

phases.name: Quality
phases.task_template: Phase 3 — Quality: Review, audit, and certify. Goal: ${goal}
phases.checkpoint: Quality gates passed and compliance verified

phases.name: Growth
phases.task_template: Phase 4 — Growth: Document, market, and launch. Goal: ${goal}
phases.checkpoint: Documentation complete and launch materials ready
